⊢ (if h : p x✝ then if h_1 : e.symm ⟨x✝, h⟩ = j then ⋯ ▸ x else v (e.symm ⟨x✝, h⟩) else w x✝) =
    if h : x✝ = ↑(e j) then ⋯ ▸ x else (fun i => if h : p i then v (e.symm ⟨i, h⟩) else w i) x✝

case pos.mk
α✝ : Sort u
β✝ : Sort v
γ✝ : Sort w
α : Type u_1
β : Sort u_2
γ : Sort u_3

v : β → γ

j : β

inst✝¹ : DecidableEq α
inst✝ : (j : α) → Decidable (p j)
i : α
h : p i

invFun✝ : Subtype p → β
left_inv✝ : LeftInverse invFun✝ toFun✝
right_inv✝ : Function.RightInverse invFun✝ toFun✝
⊢ update v j x ({ toFun := toFun✝, invFun := invFun✝, left_inv := left_inv✝, right_inv := right_inv✝ }.symm ⟨i, h⟩) =
    update

        if h : p i then
          v ({ toFun := toFun✝, invFun := invFun✝, left_inv := left_inv✝, right_inv := right_inv✝ }.symm ⟨i, h⟩)
        else w i)
      (↑({ toFun := toFun✝, invFun := invFun✝, left_inv := left_inv✝, right_inv := right_inv✝ } j)) x i
